The [[Politics/Legends|politician]] '''Tullius Valorum''' was a member of [[House Valorum/Legends|House Valorum]], a renowned political dynasty that began<ref name="NEGC" /> over 1000 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|292-293|Valorum, Supreme Chancellor Finis}}</ref> Alongside Tullius, the Valorum lineage included figures such as [[Tarsus Valorum/Legends|Tarsus]] and [[Laeca Valorum]]. When read together, their names sounded like an induction list for the [[Imperial Hall of Heroes|Hall of Heroes]], a structure on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in the [[Imperial Era/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that honored notable figures.<ref name="NEGC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tullius Valorum was mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'', a [[2002]] reference book by [[Daniel Wallace]].<ref name="NEGC" />
